title: workspaces — feature keys
description: Workspaces does not publish `features` itself — feature toggles live on the `feature-flag` module and the catalogue that decides which are ON per workspace lives on `BusinessType.default_config.features` (see `schemas/business-type.schema.json` + `data/business-types.json`). This file catalogues the SHAPE contract Workspaces owns so consumers can typecheck what a BusinessType entry may enable.

reference.distinctFrom: feature-flags.json — that file is ROLLOUT flags (canary, kill-switch); this reference is BUSINESS features (does the workspace have athletes at all).
